name: tc-unit-coverage-fixtures
description: Real TypeScript codebases for the `unit coverage` rule's integration/e2e tests (#31). Each subdirectory is a small library whose colocated vitest suite is run under v8 coverage; the suites are wired to land at known coverage levels so the thresholds in the sibling *.toml configs cleanly pass or fail. Installed once here (shared node_modules); the CLI runs vitest from each codebase dir, resolving this install via Node's parent lookup.
